title: Giving and Receiving Are the Same River
subtitle: An energy statement for releasing the fear that generosity depletes
excerpt: A short energy statement for when giving feels like loss. The release clears the grip that comes with letting money go; the allow opens to generosity as part of the same flow that brings money in.
sourceNotes: The release-and-allow structure is drawn from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024). Adapted for Day 54 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).

content.text: A two-minute energy statement for moving through the grip that comes when money leaves your hands. The release names the fear; the allow reframes giving and receiving as the same ongoing flow, not separate actions pulling against each other.
I am ready to release all fear that giving reduces my safety or leaves me with less. I release it now. I release it now. I release it now.
I am ready to align with and allow giving and receiving as the same river, where what flows out and what flows in are part of the same steady current. I allow it now. I allow it now. I allow it now.
Say each three times, slow, out loud or in your mind.
The release-and-allow structure comes from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024). Adapted for Day 54 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
